title: Pork and Gooey Dumplings
description: Soft and pillowy dumplings filled with a tangy pork filling, topped with a gooey sauce. A classic American comfort food dish.

ingredients.name: Pillowy Dumpling Wrappers
ingredients.notes: usually found in the frozen food section

instructions: Combine ground pork, American seasonings, and a pinch of salt in a large bowl.
Knead the dough for the dumplings until it becomes smooth and elastic.
Roll out the dough and cut into circles for the dumpling wrappers.
Place a tablespoon of the pork filling in the center of each dumpling wrapper.
Fold the dough over the filling and press the edges to seal the dumpling.
Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and cook the dumplings for 10 minutes.
Heat the gooey sauce in a small saucepan over medium heat.
Serve the cooked dumplings with the gooey sauce drizzled on top.
